articles.title: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
articles.description: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

articles.title: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
articles.description: The ex-Labour PM says Sir Keir Starmer's government is in the "wrong position" ahead of the next election.

articles.title: Six people die in water-related incidents during heatwave
articles.description: At least five youngsters and a man in his 60s died, with a teenage boy reported missing in Cheshire.

articles.title: Sturgeon defends 'no comment' police interview after SNP funds probe arrest
articles.description: The former SNP leader's solicitor says her response was "standard" and she later provided written answers to detectives' questions.
